chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Hello guys, my name is Nitish and you are welcome to my YouTube channel.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, we are continuing with our deep learning course.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: In the last video, we learned what is the problem with perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And we found that perceptron cannot create non-linear decision boundaries because it is a linear model.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: It draws a line and does its work.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what is the solution?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The solution is multi-layer perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: It means you can connect multiple perceptrons and make a big neural network.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And that neural network will work like a universal function approximator and will be able to create any non-linear decision boundary.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, today's video is the first video of this series in the truest sense.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Where you will meet the neural network for the first time.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And you will learn why it is able to create non-linear decision boundaries.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, in today's video, I will give you an intuition as to how multi-layer perceptron works.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And I will give you an intuition from the very first principle.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: That is, we will create logic from scratch.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And I have made a lot of diagrams.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: With the help of those diagrams, I will try to make you understand the whole concept very easily.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Also, at the end, I will show you a very good demo on the tensorflow playground.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Where you will enjoy watching that demo even more.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, that's it. Let's start the video.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, guys, let's go back to our problem.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Our problem is that we have a perceptron as an algorithm.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And it also works.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But it has only one problem.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If that non-linearity is in your data, then it is not able to capture it.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: For example, this is an example on your screen.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Here is a dataset where there are two classes.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Green and red.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But you can see that to separate these two classes, you will need a decision boundary like this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which is actually not a line.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which the perceptron draws.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: In fact, this is a curve.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, our problem is that we have to somehow make such an algorithm.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which can capture any kind of non-linearity.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which our perceptron cannot do.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And the most challenging thing is that we have to make that algorithm using only perceptrons.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, we will try to make such an algorithm using multiple perceptrons.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which can capture any kind of non-linearity.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, before moving towards multilayer perceptron, I will clear one thing here.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: In this whole video, the perceptron which I will explain to you.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The activation function in that perceptron is not a step function.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: It is a sigmoid.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And the loss function is not a hinge loss but a log loss.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Basically, I am using my perceptron like a logistic regression.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This clarity is very important.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, now let's see how the perceptron works with the sigmoid.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Funda is very simple.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Let's take the same example again.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I have CGPA and IQ.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I have to predict whether there will be a placement or not.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, how does the sigmoid work?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Your output will not be 0 or 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Or it will not be minus 1 or 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You will get a probability between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Which will tell whether that child will have a placement or not.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: For example, let me give you an example.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Assume that when you trained this model, you got W1 as 5.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: W2 as 10 and Bias as 3.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is an example.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, we have this line.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Its equation is 5x plus 10y plus 3 equal to 0.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is the equation of this line.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, as soon as you give the CGPA of a new child.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Assume that CGPA is 8.7 and IQ is 87.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what will happen?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: First of all, you will calculate Z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: How will Z be calculated?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Z will be calculated by this formula.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: W1 multiplied by CGPA.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: W2 multiplied by IQ and Bias.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: W1 is 5.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: CGPA is 8.7.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: W2 is 10.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: IQ is 87 plus 3.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is Z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, you will send Z to this sigmoid function.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is the formula of sigmoid function.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: It will give you a probability between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This probability is the probability of placement.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Assume that this probability is 0.8.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: We will say that the probability of this student being placed is 0.8.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Automatically, since only two things are possible.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The second possibility is that its probability of not being placed is 0.2.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You just have to understand that for every student, we will get two probabilities.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The first probability will be the probability of yes.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The second probability will be the probability of no.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: One more thing to understand is that every point here is a student.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This line divides this space into two regions.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: One is this and the other is this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The probability of Y on this line is 0.5.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If there is a student on this line, then its probability of being placed and not being placed is 0.5.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But as you move away from this line to the green region,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the probability of being placed is more than the probability of not being placed.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If you talk about this student, then its probability of being placed can be 0.9.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Automatically, its probability of not being placed will be 0.1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But if you talk about this student, since it is close to the line,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then its probability of being placed will be 0.6 and its probability of not being placed will be 0.4.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, if you talk about this student, since it is very far from the line in this direction,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then its probability of being placed will be very less and its probability of not being placed will be more.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If you talk about this student, then its probability of being placed will be 0.4

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and its probability of not being placed will be 0.6.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, this becomes a sort of gradient.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The more you move away from the line, the more your probability increases.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: For example, if you look at all these lines, then the probability of being placed will be 0.6

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: because this has 0.5, this has 0.7, this has 0.8, and this has 0.9.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, if you draw parallel lines here, then it will be 0.4 here.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If you draw this line, then it will be 0.5 here.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If you draw this line, then it will be 0.3 here, 0.2 here, and 0.1 here.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, that is how Perceptron works.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, you just have to understand that for every student, you will get two probabilities.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The first probability is your probability of yes, and by subtracting 1 from it, you can get the probability of no.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay, I had to explain this to you. I hope you understood this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So guys, we have understood how Perceptron works with Sigmoid.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what do we do? We try to form an idea of Multilayer Perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, let's say I have this data, which I showed you a while ago.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And let's say I have trained two different Perceptrons on this data.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is my first Perceptron, and this is my second Perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Assume for a while that here W1 is 2, W2 is 3, and Bias is 6 in this model.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And in this model, W1 is let's say 5, W2 is let's say 4, and B is 3.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, the line of this Perceptron looks like this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is the decision boundary of this Perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, the equation of this line will be 2x plus 3y plus 6.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, this is the decision boundary of the other Perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I got this line, so we can write its equation as 5x plus 4y plus 3 equal to 0.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what I am saying is, what if we somehow connect the output of these two Perceptrons, the decision boundary,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and by doing so, something like this happens.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, look at this and you will understand.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: What I have done is that I have taken this image below and superimposed it on top of this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And I am getting this kind of new decision boundary.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what I will do is, I will do a smoothening in this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what is smoothening, you will understand a little later.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And as soon as I do smoothening, I will see this output, this one.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And guess what, I wanted this decision boundary.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, whatever I have discussed with you, this is the abstract idea of multilayer Perceptrons.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, whatever we have discussed, there is no mathematical logic behind it.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I mean, I have not explained to you how this superimposition is happening or how this smoothening is happening.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I have not told you all this. I have not given you its technical details, mathematical details.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But I just want to give you an idea, I want to give you an intuition as to what is happening.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what we are doing is, to solve the same problem, we are taking more than one Perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: In our case, we are taking two Perceptrons.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The decision boundaries of both are different, as you can see.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And now, what we are doing is, first of all, we are superimposing them.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: We are placing them on top of each other.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And then, what we are doing is, we are doing smoothening.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Because of which, I am getting my desired output.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But whatever we have discussed, this is in the air.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: There is no mathematical logic behind it, I have not justified it yet.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, now I will show you how this can be achieved mathematically.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, to prove the mathematics behind this, I have placed these two Perceptrons in front of you.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, let's do one thing.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: All the points here are basically our students.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, let's say we have caught this student.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, according to this particular Perceptron, the probability of placement of this student, let's say, is 0.7.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, according to this Perceptron of this student, the probability of placement is 0.8.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, for every student, there will be a probability of placement.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what I have done is, I have caught this student again and added the output of these two.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what I have done is, if I have to find out the probability of placement of this student in my new model,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then I will add the output of this Perceptron to the output of this Perceptron and this will be my probability.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: There is only one problem that here it is 1.5 and you know that the probability is always between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, this is a problem.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But we also have a solution for this.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: What if I take this probability i and put it in the sigmoid function.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The formula for the sigmoid function is 1 plus 1 divided by 1 plus e to the power minus z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, in this case, if you want to find out, since I have calculated it, it would come out to be 0.82.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, now the combined model that we have made, where I first added these two probabilities and then put it in the sigmoid,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: so according to that new model, the probability of the placement of this student is coming out to be 0.82.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And this is what I will do with every student.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now I will take this student, I will find out its probability of yes given by Perceptron 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Then I will find out its probability with Perceptron 2.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I will add both of them and put them in the sigmoid and I will get its probability of placement.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, that is how you achieve this model.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, here you did two things, first you did addition and then put it back in the sigmoid,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: because of which the two things behind are happening, superimposition and smoothening.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, I hope you are getting a little clear here that how this whole thing is working mathematically.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You are basically finding out the linear combination.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You are using the linear combination of two perceptrons to find out the new probability.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And this is its resultant.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So guys, now the concept that we discussed, the linear combination of two perceptrons,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: let's extend it a little more.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I want to add a little flexibility to it.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Let's say I want this decision boundary instead of my decision boundary.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, if you look carefully, this decision boundary is such that

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the impact of Perceptron 1 is more on it and the impact of Perceptron 2 is less.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what I mean to say is that can I change something in this model

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: so that the output of Perceptron 1 dominates more than the output of Perceptron 2.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The answer is you can definitely do it.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: What can you do? What were we doing till now?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: We were picking up any student and taking the probability of yes from both the places.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: We were adding it and then sending it to sigmoid and that was our probability.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: What if we make this addition a weighted addition?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: That means we don't directly send this probability here.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: We send it through a weight.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Let's say I gave this weight of 10 and gave this weight of 5.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, now what I am saying is that my new model, the multi-layer Perceptron model that is being made,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the weightage of Perceptron 1 is twice that of Perceptron 2.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, now the new combination that will be made here will look like this.

chunks.text: We will take the output of Perceptron 1 and multiply it by 10 because this is its weight.

chunks.text: Now, I sent Z to the sigmoid

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and the sigmoid, for this point,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: gave a probability between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Everything is exactly the same,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: except for this extra term.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If we add another node tomorrow,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then we will have to add another term here

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: while calculating Z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, the thing to understand is

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: that first, you can add nodes

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in your hidden layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You can add as many as you want.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And the second thing to understand is

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: that the more nodes you add,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the more help you will get

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in making more complex non-linear decision boundaries

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: as I have shown you in this example.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The second way to change

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the architecture of your neural network

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: is to increase the number of nodes

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in your input layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But you will only do this

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: when the input columns in your data increase.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Like, till now, we were talking

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: that we have CGPA as input column

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and IQ as input column.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If we had another input column in our data,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: which is 12K marks,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then in our input column,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: sorry, in our input layer,

chunks.text: we will have 3 nodes.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And now, all this data

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: will go in 3D.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, let's say, on the x-axis,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: CGPA, on the y-axis, IQ,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and on the z-axis,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: your 12K marks.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And I told you that if it is in 3D,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then your perceptron model

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: will be a plane.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And you can see that this is a plane.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Similarly, this is another perceptron model.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is also a plane.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Now, what I will do is,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I will combine these two planes linearly.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Again, I will get a linear combination.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, if you take any point,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then for the probability

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: of that point being green or red,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: first of all, I will get

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: its probability.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: I will multiply it by W1

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and I will do the same thing

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: with W2, its probability.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Again, I will calculate Z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Again, I will calculate Sigma of Z.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And for that, I will get

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: a probability between 0 and 1.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? So, here,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: it is a very simple thing that the more

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: columns there are in your input,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the more nodes there will be in the input layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? And if there was one more,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then it would have become 4D.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And then it would have become a hyperplane instead of a plane.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? Obviously, we cannot visualize it.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But we can see it up to 3D.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? So, this is the second case

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: where you are increasing the number of nodes in the input layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The third way is to change

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: the architecture of the neural network

chunks.text: that you increase the number of nodes in your output layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, till now,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in all the examples that we have discussed,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: we have always noticed that

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in the last one, there is only one perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But it is not necessary. If you want,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you can keep more than one perceptron.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Usually, you do this when you are doing

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: multi-class classification.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: For example,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you have to look at a photo and tell

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: whether there is a dog in that photo

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: or a cat or a human.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what you will do is

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you will make a perceptron

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: attached to all three.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is for a dog, this is for a cat

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and this is for a human.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: In the end, whichever of these

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: has a higher probability,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: for that particular photo, you will say

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: that it is a dog or a cat

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: or a human.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, what you have to learn is that

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in the case of multi-class classification,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you keep multiple nodes

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in your output layer. Okay?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The fourth way is to

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: change the architecture of the neural network

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: that you increase the number of

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: hidden layers.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Till now, we have not

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: increased a single layer. We were increasing

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: nodes in the layer. But if you want,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you can increase the number of hidden layers.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Here, you see this is the input layer

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and this is the output layer.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But here, I have

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: two hidden layers.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: This is hidden layer 1

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: and this is my hidden layer

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? What will be the

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: benefit of doing this?

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: The benefit will be that when you have

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: very complex non-linear data

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: which you can get out of

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: a very complex decision boundary,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: in that case,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you can create such a complex decision boundary

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: only by adding layers.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, you can see that

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: your first layer, hidden layer,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: is only creating linear decision boundaries.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: But as you

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: go deep in your neural network,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you will be able to capture

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: complex relationships.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: And then, if they have a linear

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: combination, then more complex

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: relationships can be captured.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: So, for this reason,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: neural networks are called

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: universal function approximators.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: You can give any

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: complex data

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: which has a lot of non-linearity.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: If you add enough

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: hidden layers in your network,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then given enough time,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: if you give enough time in training,

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: then your neural network

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: will capture that relationship.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: Okay? So, this is a very

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: important concept that you can

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: create a deep neural network.

chunks.text: enough hidden layers and

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: you can create any mathematical function

chunks.text: with your neural network.

chunks.title: Multi Layer Perceptron ｜ MLP Intuition
chunks.text: with your neural network.
